{{Quote|Unidentified ship, this is the Corporate Sector vessel ''Enforce''. Identify yourself and prepare to be boarded.|''Enforce''|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''''Enforce''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] under the command of [[Baruche Sloane]]. Commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Baruche Sloane]], it was assigned to customs duty in the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]].

{{Ship-stub}}
